name: debug
usage_summary: Imported once in packages/eslint-plugin-cli/rules/no-inline-graphql.js via `require('debug')('eslint-plugin-cli:no-inline-graphql')`. Used on a single line inside checkKnownFailuresIfShouldFail() to emit a namespaced debug log when a violation is detected.
how_to_remove: The single debug() call can be replaced by a conditional `if (process.env.DEBUG?.includes('eslint-plugin-cli')) console.error(...)` or simply removed, since it is a developer-facing diagnostic line inside an ESLint rule that most users never enable. No other rule files in the package use debug.
replacement_reason: The entire usage is one diagnostic log line in one ESLint rule file. Replacing it with a short inline conditional on process.env.DEBUG eliminates the dependency entirely with zero functional regression for end users.
